decision.title: Use KAPLAY with canvas-drawn sprites for visual assets
decision.summary: Using KAPLAY game framework with canvas-drawn sprites/shapes for entities and SVG-style icons for room types. This avoids external asset dependencies while meeting the UI quality gate.
decision.impact: All visual elements are self-contained in code. No external asset loading failures possible.

decision.title: Scene-based architecture with shared game state
decision.summary: Each major game mode (title, room, combat, forge, dialogue) is a separate KAPLAY scene. A shared GameState object persists across scene transitions.
decision.impact: Clean separation of concerns. Scene transitions are the main navigation mechanism.
